meaning: adj.空的,空白的,空灵的,头脑空虚的,神情茫然的,空闲的,空缺的
examples: The seat next to him was vacant.
She had a kind of vacant look on her face.
The position of chairman has been vacant for some time.
As the years passed, many of the buildings were left vacant above street level.
With more than 43 percent of the land vacant, Youngstown is slowly being erased.
